name: Gemma S.
review: What a fantastic experience. The dive shop and instructors are top-notch. I was a little nervous as my 14-year-old and 12-year-old had never dived before, but watching the team work with them I felt extremely comfortable and confident. Both boys went on to complete Open Water and Advanced certifications. Their shop has a relaxed and professional vibe that made each of our seven days extremely enjoyable.
